content.en:
The main department of Luo Mu, Ye Tian's residence.

At this moment, he has returned here, and then began to receive the inheritance of the ultimate ancient demon Aroye.

Rumble!!!!!

Countless pieces of information were integrated into Ye Tian's ultimate will in the form of ultimate particles, and this information was gradually mastered by Ye Tian~.

"Aloye's ultimate ancient demon inheritance really contains infinite mysteries!"

Ye Tian said with emotion.

The Ultimate Ancient Demon Inheritance not only has detailed cultivation experience and many secret methods for each realm, but more importantly, the Ultimate Ancient Demon Inheritance also has a very precious inheritance information——- Extreme Ultimate Arcane!

The Extreme Path Ultimate Arcane is the strongest Ultimate Arcane above the Peak Ultimate Arcane, and once you comprehend one, you can be invincible in the Peak Ancient Demon Level Realm.

However, it was difficult for countless peak Ancient Demon-level powerhouses to create the Extreme Path Ultimate Arcane, and there were only a handful of peak Ancient Demon-level powerhouses who could truly comprehend the Extreme Path Ultimate Arcane, and those few had already broken through to the Ultimate Ancient Magic.

In this era, it seems that there is no peak ancient demon-level powerhouse who can comprehend the ultimate arcane art!

Of course, there may be, but it's too hidden.

Aloye's Ultimate Ancient Demon Inheritance contains an Extreme Ultimate Arcane, which can be used for reference, but it is definitely not suitable for him, and he cannot use it.

In addition, Ye Tian also learned from the Aloye Ultimate Ancient Demon Inheritance how to hope to break through to the Ultimate Ancient Demon.

First of all, his Ten Thousand Laws Ultimate Body must break through to the Perfection Realm, the Ten Thousand Laws Ultimate Rule Realm must also reach the Perfection Realm, and the Ultimate Will must reach the true limit.

And if you want to break through, you must transform the ultimate body into the ultimate ancient demon body, which is extremely difficult.

Under normal circumstances, the success rate of a peak Ancient Demon-level powerhouse attacking the Ultimate Ancient Demon is 1 in 10,000, even if the major main departments have some secret methods that can increase the success rate, it is definitely difficult to exceed 1 in 1,000.

However, with the help of the Ancient Pillar of Time and Space, the success rate can be increased to the realm of thirty percent, and if you get some special ultimate Space-Time Ancient Treasures to help break through, you can also increase the success rate.

And some special form secret methods can also enhance the success rate of breakthrough at critical moments.

This has led to some peak ancient demon-level powerhouses with incomparably rich backgrounds, and if they use the space-time ancient demon pillar, they can increase the success rate to fifty percent.

Fifty percent of the success rate, this is already an extremely high success rate for many peak ancient demon-level powerhouses, and they can give it a go.

Of course, once the fight is successful, it will become the ultimate ancient demon existence, and once the fight fails, it will die and everything will turn into dust.

Since this era of infinite ancient demons, there have been a lot of fallen peak ancient demon-level powerhouses, many of whom have lived for too long, and are not afraid of life and death at all, even if there is only a 1 in 10,000 success rate, they still want to fight, this fall.

At present, the most promising way to break through is to compete for the luck of the space-time ancient demon pillar, so that a peak ancient demon can break through with the help of the space-time ancient magic pillar.

That's what the Ancient Demon of the Underworld had to do, so he wanted to compete for luck.

Of course, the competition for success is not necessarily a good thing, and if the breakthrough fails, it will really fall.

And the failure of the battle for luck may not be a bad thing, at least there is no need to risk impacting the ultimate ancient demon realm, maybe there will be a big opportunity in the future, and you can still break through to the ultimate ancient demon realm!

......

"After obtaining Aloye's Ultimate Ancient Demon Inheritance, it is almost impossible to create the Extreme Ultimate Arcane in a short period of time, but at least you can create some more Peak Ultimate Arcane!" Ye Tian muttered.

In the days that followed, Ye Tian would go out to fight from time to time, and kill some more ancient demon-level powerhouses, so that he could get more luck power, and at least he could get some resources!

And even if he really falls, he can claim to be a doppelganger.

Of course.

Once the Ancient Demon-level Replication Body falls, he needs to break through again, because his Replication Talent cannot directly replicate the Ancient Demon-level Replication Body, which is also a flaw.

However, his emperor-level copy body could break through to the ancient demon level realm in a single thought, and he also specially opened up a void, where breaking through would hardly reveal news.

Therefore, even if the copy body falls, it will not have much impact on him.

Over the years, he had allowed multiple replica bodies to break through to the realm of the Ancient Demon Level, and had kept them for backup and research.

Time flies.

The battle for the luck of the Ancient Demon Pillar of Time and Space is gradually coming to an end, and at this time, the most powerful luck is undoubtedly the main department of the Luo Mother, but the second place is only a little bit behind.

Therefore, the main division of the Arrow mother may not be able to achieve the final victory.

At this time, ordinary Ancient Demon-level powerhouses didn't dare to go out at all, and the top Ancient Demon-level powerhouses were also grouped together, and the ones who really fought still belonged to those peak Ancient Demon-level powerhouses.

The Ancient Demon Capital was hit hard many times, but fortunately, in the end, it returned again and again.

At this time, the killing of many peak Ancient Demon-level powerhouses became more and more frequent, and if a peak-level Ancient Demon-level powerhouse fell, the power of luck would change dramatically.

For example, if the main department of the mother of Arrow fell to a peak ancient demon-level powerhouse, it would lose its position as the first place.

At the last moment, no one can guarantee what will happen.

If the peak ancient demon-level powerhouses of the main department of Aromu stay in the Arrowmu Fortress and can't get out, they may also lose the first place.

After all, the second place only needs to kill one more peak ancient demon-level powerhouse, and he can rank first.

"You can only keep fighting!"

The pinnacle ancient demon-level powerhouses of the Aromu Fortress thought to themselves.

this day.

The Ancient Demon of the Dark Elegance came to Ye Tian again.

"God, I want to ask you to make a move, and as a bait, attract a peak ancient demon-level powerhouse, and the peak ancient demon-level powerhouse of our Aromu Fortress will besiege and kill it. The Ancient Demon said.

"Lord Stygian Ancient Demon, are you sure this method is feasible?"

Ye Tian asked.

"It must be possible, you have killed a lot of ordinary ancient demon-level powerhouses and top-level ancient demon-level powerhouses, and many peak ancient demon-level powerhouses want to attack and kill you. "The Ancient Demon Path.

"But if I go out suddenly, anyone will suspect that there is a trap, right?"

Ye Tian asked again.

The Ancient Demon explained, "Now that the major peak Ancient Demon level powerhouses are in a stalemate, they are already negotiating to let the other Ancient Demon level powerhouses participate in the battle and have the final decisive battle. So, it's reasonable for you to go out. "

"What's in it for me, because of this plan, I can easily fall!" Ye Tian asked.
